staticFirstPolicy.summary: All core city, boundary, TOP100, household, and simulated weather data must be bundled as static assets. Live services may only be optional, non-blocking enhancements with visible fallback disclosure.

approvedSources.name: 국토교통부_일별법정구역정보 SHP
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; never client runtime fetch
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: 공공데이터포털 page lists 무료 and 이용허락범위 제한 없음; verify and preserve snapshot-specific metadata when derived geometry is committed.

approvedSources.name: VWorld 법정경계 SHP download surfaces
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; simplify before bundling
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Use only when the selected dataset's current license permits bundled derived visualization with attribution.

capitals.inclusionRule: Bundle sovereign-state capital candidates with coordinates and a safe HTTPS Wikipedia or source URL; generated data must exceed the legacy 33 curated entries.

approvedSources.name: Wikidata Query Service country/capital/coordinate candidates
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; no client runtime query
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Record the SPARQL query, extraction date, and Wikidata/linked-page attribution notes in the generated dataset metadata.

top100Cities.metric: international overnight visitors, 2018 arrivals with 2019 forecast context
top100Cities.fallbackDecision: Use the complete public Mastercard Global Destination Cities Index 2019 report unless a later complete public Top 100 travel-city source is approved before UI dependency. Do not infer from partial Agoda/Euromonitor previews.

approvedSources.name: Mastercard Global Destination Cities Index 2019 global report
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time manual/static transcription with source metadata; no runtime dependency
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Public report is used as ranking provenance for a static, attributed list; do not bundle report text or assets beyond minimal factual ranking metadata.

rejectedSources.reason: Public Agoda materials are partial/promotional and do not provide a legally complete global top-100 dataset for this static app.
Use only if a complete legally accessible Top 100 list is obtained; public preview pages alone are insufficient for exact 100 bundled rows.

approvedSources.name: Open-Meteo Forecast API
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: optional client enhancement only; never block render; no key in public build
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Free API is no-key and non-commercial with rate limits/no uptime guarantee; attribution and graceful fallback are required.

forbiddenBehavior: required live weather for first render
secret key or paid endpoint in client bundle
copy that implies guaranteed real-time weather when simulated or fallback data is shown

validationContract.cityDataVerifier: scripts/verify-city-data.mjs must validate capital count > 33, TOP100 exact count 100, ranks 1-100, coordinates, unique ids, HTTPS links, and dataset source metadata.
validationContract.boundaryWeatherVerifier: scripts/verify-boundary-data.mjs or successor must validate Korea boundary provenance, household invariants, weather fallback policy, and no live map/API requirement.
